message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker and refresh extension onboarding queue rankings

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with new issue entries from concurrent agent
sessions tracking extension runtime work.

Regenerate extension onboarding queue from latest candidate pool data:
- docs/extension-onboarding-queue.json: updated priority scores and rank
  positions reflecting latest conformance pass rates and probe results
- docs/extension-onboarding-queue.md: corresponding markdown table with
  refreshed timestamp (03:14:42Z -> 05:41:13Z)

Minor rank position shifts across the board as scoring incorporates
recent validation pipeline improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
